name: neuraforge-ai
description: AI-powered development platform — 24 agents, 19 MCP servers, 21 skills for end-to-end software development across React, React Native, Flutter, .NET, and NestJS

industry.title: Industry Domain (optional)
industry.description: Your industry — e.g., financial-services, healthcare, e-commerce, saas, edtech, logistics. Leave blank for generic.

country.title: Country / Region (optional)
country.description: Your regulatory region — e.g., india, us, uk, eu, singapore. Affects compliance rules and formatting.

domain_context.title: Domain Details (optional)
domain_context.description: Specific domain context — e.g., 'SEBI-regulated mutual fund AMC', 'HIPAA-compliant telehealth', 'PCI-DSS payment processor'. Leave blank for generic.

currency.title: Currency (optional)
currency.description: Primary currency symbol and format — e.g., ₹ (Indian), $ (US), £ (UK), € (EU)

figma_token.title: Figma Token (optional)
figma_token.description: Figma Personal Access Token for design-to-code
